name: tamazia
description: Tamazia Electron app for iPhone monitoring

scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npx electron-packager . Tamazia --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --prune=true --asar=true
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npx electron-packager . Tamazia --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --prune=true --asar=true
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npx electron-packager . Tamazia --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --prune=true --asar=true

author: Tamazia667
